message:
chore(gitignore): Exclude beads local version marker

Add .beads/.local_version to .gitignore. This file is a runtime marker
used by the beads system to track local database state and should not
be version controlled. It's automatically created during beads
operations and is specific to each developer's local environment.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,6 +58,7 @@ diary/*.md
 usage.jsonl
 
 # Beads (issue tracking is committed; runtime files are ignored via `.beads/.gitignore`)
+.beads/.local_version
 
 # Python / uv
 __pycache__/
